name: Decorative floor pattern
description: A style-varied decorative floor treatment for ANY room of ANY building. Lays a central rug bounded by a perimeter border (carpet + planks/stone/concrete). Auto-scales with the room AABB; skips rooms too small for the inset.
placement_rules: Lays the border on y0+1 one cell inset from each wall.
Centre rug fills the inner rectangle when both interior axes are > 4.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.floor_pattern.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
